v0.7.0

Prompt 7 — Attribution & Certification UI

~86% complete

FaultTrace-RAG

Overview Dashboard

Counterfactual fault localization and evidence certification for corpus-level analytics.

Research Objectives

When an LLM analytics pipeline produces an incorrect answer over a corpus, identifying the failure origin is a core engineering challenge. FaultTrace-RAG systematically evaluates three key components: Retrieval Scope (R), Fact Extraction (E), and Aggregation Logic (A). By substituting components with deterministic oracles, we compute exact Shapley value fault attributions and issue evidence coverage certificates to prevent hallucinated answers.

REA Compounding Pipeline Architecture

R

Retrieval Scope

Filters matches from corpus to form context record IDs.

E

Fact Extraction

Extracts structured attributes from context records.

A

Aggregation Logic

Computes structured reduction (Count, Mean, Top-K).

Guided Walkthrough

Interactive Guided Research Demo

Demonstrates how FaultTrace-RAG isolates retrieval omission faults (P1 vs. P4) using Shapley values and Selective Prediction certificates.

Click "Run Guided Demo" to spin up the RAG execution, compute diagnostic values, and verify evidence integrity.
